T I Tf5^ ^ H - ^ J |fi77/WIT^ 25, \flA9 Ncv/ Delhi, the 24ih June. 1977 G.S.R, 92J.—Whereas a druft of certain rules further to amend the Tea Rules, 19S4 wus published, ns required by sub- section (1) of section 49 of the Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), at puces 2439 and 2440 of the Gazette of India Fart II Sec- tion (3) Sub- section (i), dated the 25th September, 1976 with the notification of the Ciovcrnmcm of India, in the Minis- try of Commerce No. O.S.R. 1374 dated the bth September, 1976 inviting objections and suggestions from nil persons likely to be affected thereby within n period of forty five days from the date of publication of the Oflkiul Gazette conhiininR the said notification ; And whereas, the said Gazette containing tlic said notifi- cation wfis published on the 25tb September, 1976 ; And whereas, the said Oazxrtte was made available to the public on 29tl» September, 1976 -, And whereon, no objection or siigaestion has been receiv- ed from the public in this regard by the Central Government; Now, therefore, in exercwe of the powers conferred by section 49 of the aforesaid Act, the Central Government here- by nutkcH the following rules further to amend the Tea Rules, 1954, namely : — 1. ([) These rules may be called the Tea (Amendment) Rules, 1977. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in Uic Official Gazette. 2. In sub-rule (1) of rule 4 of tho Tea Rules, 1954, for clause (h), the following clause shall be substituted, name- ly :— "(h) two persons representing such other persons or class of persons, who, in the opinion of the Central Gov- ernment, ought to be represented on the Board.". [No. E. 12012(1 )/74.plont(A)] MRS. KOMAL ANAND, Dy. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
